title: SEO
subTitle: Multilingual, crawlable sites that rank
overviewContent: I build SEO into sites from the structure up. On the H & H Lawyers rebuild this meant a generated sitemap, hreflang tags across four languages (English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese), an RSS feed, semantic markup, route-level metadata and Open Graph tags, plus Core Web Vitals budgets enforced in CI. Earlier work covered meta tags, structured data, mobile responsiveness and a keyword strategy that secured top Google rankings for target clients, contributing to higher organic traffic and measurable business growth.
